title: Immersive Amethyst: Emergent Geology
description: A balanced way of getting Budding Amethyst blocks.
body: Ever wish you could get Budding Amethyst so you could make your own geodes elsewhere for farming? Now you can through the power of (semi) realistic scienceTM! This is an incredibly lightweight vanilla-esque mod boasting several new achievements, tool types, blocks, ores, and more!
